text_block_list.text:
One day, I catch Hishi Amazon in the hallway,
groaning with her head in her hands.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Dang it, how can a simple headache get the best
of me, the great Hishiama—arrrgh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Hey, Teach. Don't you worry, it's not a big
deal.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I probably used my brain way too much and gave
myself a headache...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I was reading a recipe book. It's the one my
dad used back in the States.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But the units in the book are completely different
to Japan's! Apparently, one pound is about 453
grams!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And all the temperatures were written in
Fahrenheit. I can't do number stuff very well...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But the pictures looked so good! It took me a
while to calculate things, but I found a way!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Urk... Talking makes the pain worse!

Hishi Amazon is struggling to deal with her
headache.
